DECLARATION OF DAN GINZBURG IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR VALUNTARY DISMISSAL OF PAGA CLAIMS (TRANSACTION ID # 75644573) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STELZMILLER, JOSH DYLAN , INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED VISICO, LEVINE SILVERIO , INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-06-25 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFFS JOSH STELZMILLER, INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED, AND LEVINE VISICO'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR VOLUNTARY DISMISSAL OF PAGA CLAIMS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE PAGA CLAIMS ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. Motion And Notice Of Motion For Voluntary Dismissal Of Paga Claims
Off Calendar Mar-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS JOSH STELZMILLER, INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED, AND LEVINE VISICO's Motion For Voluntary Dismissal Of Paga Claims.

The unopposed motion to dismiss is granted. Plaintiff's individual claims are dismissed with prejudice. Plaintiff's representative PAGA claims are dismissed without prejudice.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
